included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Arrival in Goa & Beach Relaxation
itinerary.description: Arrive in tropical Goa. Check in to your beach resort and spend the day relaxing on the golden sands of Calangute and Baga beaches, enjoying sunset views.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Dandeli & White Water Rafting
itinerary.description: Drive to Dandeli, South India's adventure hub. Experience a thrilling white-water rafting expedition on the Kali River and watch for crocodiles.

itinerary.title: Shimoga Waterfalls & Heritage Sites
itinerary.description: Travel to Shimoga. Visit local waterfalls, historic temples, and enjoy the scenic greenery of the Western Ghats landscape.

itinerary.title: Drive to Chikmagalur & Mullayanagiri Trek
itinerary.description: Drive to Chikmagalur. Hike up to Mullayanagiri Peak, the highest point in Karnataka, to witness the mist rolling over the coffee estates below.

itinerary.title: Coffee Estate Walk & Departure
itinerary.description: Take a guided walk through a private coffee estate to learn about bean cultivation. Savor a freshly brewed local coffee cup before departing.

title: Goa, Dandeli & Chikmagalur: Beaches, Rafting & Coffee Hills
description: Embark on an adventure of a lifetime. Relax on Goa's beaches, go white-water rafting and jungle safari in Dandeli, visit the heritage sites of Shimoga, and trek through the lush coffee estates of Chikmagalur.
highlights: Enjoy water sports and nightlife on Goa's sun-kissed beaches
Go white-water rafting and crocodile spotting in Dandeli
Trek Mullayanagiri Peak and walk coffee plantations in Chikmagalur
